# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM python:3.11-slim

# Create non-root user for running the application
RUN groupadd -r processor && useradd -r -g processor -u 1000 processor

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install security updates and required packages
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get upgrade -y && \
    apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    file \
    clamav \
    clamav-daemon && \
    apt-get clean && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Create necessary directories with proper permissions
RUN mkdir -p /app/uploads /app/processed /app/quarantine /app/logs && \
    chown -R processor:processor /app

# Copy application files
COPY --chown=processor:processor requirements.txt .
COPY --chown=processor:processor process_files.py .
COPY --chown=processor:processor config.py .

# Install Python dependencies
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Set secure file permissions
RUN chmod 750 /app && \
    chmod 700 /app/uploads /app/processed /app/quarantine && \
    chmod 640 /app/*.py

# Configure resource limits in the application
ENV MAX_FILE_SIZE=10485760
ENV MAX_FILES_PER_BATCH=100
ENV ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS=".txt,.csv,.json,.xml"
ENV UPLOAD_PATH=/app/uploads
ENV PROCESSED_PATH=/app/processed
ENV QUARANTINE_PATH=/app/quarantine

# Security hardening
RUN chmod 1777 /tmp && \
    find /app -type d -exec chmod 750 {} \; && \
    find /app -type f -exec chmod 640 {} \;

# Switch to non-root user
USER processor

# Health check
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \
    CMD python -c "import os; exit(0 if os.path.exists('/app/uploads') else 1)"

# Volume mount point (to be mounted at runtime with read-only option)
VOLUME ["/app/uploads"]

# Run the processing application
CMD ["python", "-u", "process_files.py"]
